comment: Synthetic metastatic HR+/HER2- breast cancer with germline BRCA1 pathogenic variant (c.5266dupC), female 41 premenopausal, ER 70% / PR 50% / HER2 IHC 1+. Anchor: OlympiAD → olaparib monotherapy (HER2-negative metastatic gBRCA1/2). Engine: ALGO-BREAST-1L step 1 HER2-amp False → step 3 free-text TNBC condition False → step 5 default → IND-BREAST-HR-POS-MET-1L-CDKI. The BRCA-PARPi indication (IND-BREAST-BRCA-POS-MET-PARPI) is exposed as an alternative track and surfaces via RF-BREAST-BRCA-GERMLINE-ACTIONABLE. Drift: olaparib-first per OlympiAD is not the default at 1L in current KB; clinician override via MDT preserves OlympiAD pathway.
